series_metadata.series_title: PERMIT TO INSTALL & DETAIL PLAN LOG
series_metadata.series_description: Contains project name, date, and action taken on each new installation of wastewater, water supply, land pollution and air source.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: five years in operating area data deemed not useful. Microfilm data that is deemed useful and hardcopy microfilm has been checked quality and completeness
